title: T-067 — UI: Live Cost + Nutrition + Allergen panels + composition bar (NutritionPanel/CostPanel/AllergenPanel prototype) (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-067 — Live cost/nutrition/allergen panels UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 (live <50 ms recompute) + UX 01-NPD-UX.md recipe_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:26-122 (NutritionPanel + CostPanel + AllergenPanel) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:141-264 (RecipeScreen container)

## Goal
Three side panels rendering live recomputeCalc output: NutritionPanel (per-100g traffic-light bars), CostPanel (raw cost / margin / target-price slider), AllergenPanel (badges per RM), Composition stacked bar — recompute fires inside React on ingredient change in <50 ms.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/nutrition-panel.tsx ('use client') uses recomputeCalc result; renders 7-row table + traffic-light bars (CSS).
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/cost-panel.tsx ('use client') renders cost + margin + target-price Slider (shadcn Slider).
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/allergen-panel.tsx ('use client') renders Badge per Reference.Allergens with allergen-set membership.
4. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/composition-bar.tsx (composition stacked bar SVG/CSS).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/nutrition-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/cost-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/allergen-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/composition-bar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/__tests__/panels.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production panels render, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:26-122 (NutritionPanel + CostPanel + AllergenPanel), then NutritionPanel has 7 rows + traffic-light bars, CostPanel has raw cost + margin + Slider, AllergenPanel renders Badge per allergen — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist using shadcn primitives
2. Given the user changes one ingredient pct in the parent editor, when the panel re-renders, then the recomputeCalc-driven values update within 50 ms p95 per §17.11.1 perf contract — measured via React Profiler in test
3. Given an ingredient with allergen='gluten' is added, when AllergenPanel re-renders, then a 'gluten' Badge appears highlighted per §17.11.1 + §8.5 cascade

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/panels.test.tsx asserting parity + 50 ms recompute latency + allergen badge update before components exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test panels'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call recomputeCalc on every render (memoise via useMemo)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not exceed 50 ms p95 recompute on 50 ingredients
